calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Continued To Sep-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Wolff for the Shriners Hospitals. Paul Melbostad for Samuel Goldreich, Kenneth Massen, Karen Selski, Judith Serfaty and Susan Sandoun (Heirs).

The Parties reported that they had discussions regarding the possibility of settlement and requested the evidentiary hearing be heard in late September. The Court will take no action on the Petition For Final Distribution as there is the issue of the pending objections. The evidentiary hearing was continued to September 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and is expected to be take one full day.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-29-2009 Continued To Jun-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Wolff for Shriners Hosptial. Paul Melbostad for Samuel Goldreich, Kenneth Massen and Karen Selski. Steven Weinkauff for the Administrator. Giulio Acconero for other Interested Persons.

Mr. Acconero stated that he would be filing a statement of interest. The Court suggested the Parties participate in mediation. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to mediation or setting the matter for an evidentiary hearing. Upon conclusion of argument, the Parties elected to submit the matter based on the filed documents. The matter was taken under submission for the Court to make a decision on the pleadings.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
